questions.question: Describe the difference between a connection-oriented and connectionless transport protocol. Provide an example of each. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the characteristics of both types of protocols and provide examples to illustrate your answer.

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) in establishing and maintaining a connection between devices on a network? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the role of TCP in ensuring reliable data transfer.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the performance characteristics of the Internet Protocol (IP) and the Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP). (20 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each protocol in terms of their routing and error-reporting capabilities.
